channel.title: home on hilah.angelcities.net
channel.description: Recent content in home on hilah.angelcities.net

item.title: artist statement
item.description: artist statement my name is hilah (ee-la) and i’m a multi-media artist. i make images , essays , and websites , (and sometimes songs ). i grew up in the mid-2000s, living virutally on internet forums, online games, and chatrooms, but physically i’ve lived in the midwest my whole life. much of my childhood was spent introspectively and anonymously, fostering a perception and space for myself online in a way that i wasn’t able to in real life.

item.title: bio
item.description: bio hilah katherine t. (b. 1997) is a multi-media digital artist from the midwest where she has been writing, photographing and digitizing for most of her life. she attended the university of kansas, in her hometown, where she studied computer science, and then photography and creative writing. hilah’s work is a personal archive of memories; moments that are blurred between the softness of the past and the dreary reflection of the present.

item.title: girlhood
item.description: ⭑･ﾟﾟ･:༅｡.｡༅:ﾟ:✼✿ ✿✼:ﾟ:༅｡.｡༅:･ﾟﾟ･⭑ girlhood by hilah katherine t. photos and essays retracing memories of 2007 to 2013. ⭑･ﾟﾟ･:༅｡.｡༅:ﾟ:✼✿ ✿✼:ﾟ:༅｡.｡༅:･ﾟﾟ･⭑ forward i spent my childhood quietly in the midwestern suburbs of kansas. life at home and in school felt uncomfortable and rigid, like the idyllic cookie-cutter neighborhoods that i was sheltered in. i was a preadolescent trans girl consciously exploring gender for the first time in a place that required conformity to survive.

item.title: resume
item.description: hilah katherine thomas she/her | hilahthomas@gmail.com education 2020 bfa photography @ university of kansas exhibitions 2021 bfa photography exhibition, university of kansas, lawrence, ks 2020 bfa photography exhibition, university of kansas, online student juried art show, spencer museum of art, lawrence, ks liminal, cumulus photo, online 2018 16x16x16 traveling group exhibition, university of iowa, university of kansas, omaha metropolitan community college, montana state university student juried art exhibit, lied center of kansas, lawrence, ks

item.title: resume
item.description: hilah katherine thomas she/her | hilahthomas@gmail.com education 2020 | bfa (photography) @ university of kansas, school of architecture & design work 2022-present | web developer @ agile technology solutions 2021-2022 | photographer @ freelance 2020-2021 | team member @ wonderfair 2020 | teaching assistant @ university of kansas 2017-2020 | web developer @ lied center of kansas references lisa braun | associate director @ agile technology solutions lbraun@ku.edu shala stevenson | creative director @ lied center of kansas sstevenson@ku.
